summary:
Master consolidated Wincham investigation file. Combines all four source markdown files into one complete forensic dossier:
1. Wincham Group Comprehensive Forensic Audit — all 21 UK/Spanish entities, 22 named associates, required accreditations, risk matrix, and Lanzarote legal authority analysis (Section 8) including Brexit timeline and six specific violations.
2. SSL/TLS Certificate Failure Report — NET::ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID technical analysis, UK GDPR Article 32 breach, ICO referral advice, ICAEW referral paragraph, and regulatory action plan.
3. Lanzarote / Canary Islands Legal Authority Analysis — standalone deep-dive into Canarian REF regime, IGIC, three-layer legal architecture, six violations, and recommended regulatory actions.
4. Full Session Reconstruction — forensic portal scrape of Philip Harrison's Wincham client cases (WI-25863 and WI-13211), cash book anomalies including the €53,002 telephone entry, 10:1 share discrepancy, 14 contract irregularities, quantum summary (~£62,000–£70,000), and full file inventory of all 21 evidence files generated.
Classified: Strictly Private & Confidential — Attorney-Client Privileged Work Product.
